note: Lottery UTXOs (OUT_COINBASE_LOTTERY, type=4) now display as LOTTERY (magenta) instead of generic OUTPUT in the address detail UTXO table and tx detail panels. Address detail balance section splits coinbase strictly by u.type: MINED is type=1 only, LOTTERY UNSPENT is type=4 only, with TOTAL = MINED + RECEIVED + LOTTERY UNSPENT preserved by construction. Two lottery rows: 'DTD LOTTERY (current unspent)' from the live UTXO set (always exact, no scan dependency) and 'DTD LOTTERY WON (lifetime)' from the DTD scan with an 'N already spent' annotation when they differ. UTXO MATURITY legend gains a magenta lottery counter beside Mature/Immature. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) if your browser is stuck on the old cache.
